summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a legendary, high‑energy show with a raging second set and solid Jerry Garcia playing despite minor shakiness.
review: The recording is praised for being complete and sounding great, though one reviewer notes a bit of shakiness compared to surrounding dates. Musically the concert is described as very strong, especially the second set that “just rages,” with Jerry Garcia fired up and delivering fierce guitar work despite some vocal wear. Overall the performance is celebrated as a fitting end‑to‑tour highlight.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers are enthusiastic; two give 5 stars and one gives no rating but offers strong praise. Show quality is highlighted as outstanding, while recording quality is generally good with only minor shakiness noted.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear and complete; one reviewer mentions a bit of shakiness compared to nearby shows but overall sounds great.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Very strong first set with Jerry fired up, followed by an especially raging second set that caps off the tour on a high note.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Fired up in the first set; vocal wear noted but compensated by fierce, supernova‑like guitar playing.
